2606.20868.title: Can LLMs Reason About Brand Ownership? An Empirical Study of Domain Attribution Intelligence
2606.20868.paper_summary: When a new domain resembling a popular brand appears, defenders face a fundamental ambiguity: it may be an attacker-created squatting site for phishing, or it may be a domain the brand itself registered, either defensively, to block attackers, or legitimately, for a new product or service launch. Incorrectly flagging a brand-owned domain as malicious produces a false positive that harms end users and damages the brand's reputation. Resolving this ambiguity requires brand intelligence: the ability to determine, at scale, whether a given domain belongs to a brand. Large language models (LLMs), with their broad knowledge of brand domain relationships, offer a promising zero configuration approach to this problem, but their reliability for brand intelligence tasks remains unknown. We present the first systematic empirical evaluation of LLM brand intelligence across three tasks: domain enumeration (Q1), open ended brand attribution (Q2), and binary ownership classification (Q3). We evaluate four models, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Claude Sonnet 4.5, and Claude Sonnet 4.6, across four retrieval settings (in context, web search, WHOIS lookup, and combined) on 36 of the most phished brands. Our results reveal a stark dichotomy: models achieve up to 82% precision enumerating brand domains from memory alone, yet fail at ownership verification without external tools, with macro F1 at most 0.37 in ICL mode. WHOIS augmentation lifts Q3 macro F1 by up to 0.65 points, yielding near perfect precision (<= 0.99), dramatically reducing the false positive risk for defenders. We provide concrete recommendations for deploying LLMs in brand protection pipelines.
2606.20868.paper_summary_zh: 當一個新的域名出現，類似於一個受歡迎的品牌時，防禦者面臨一個根本的模糊性：這可能是攻擊者創建的用於網絡釣魚的佔用網站，或者這可能是品牌本身註冊的域名，無論是出於防禦目的以阻止攻擊者，還是合法地為新產品或服務的推出。錯誤地將品牌擁有的域名標記為惡意會產生虛假正面，這會損害最終用戶並損害品牌的聲譽。解決這一模糊性需要品牌情報：能夠在大規模上確定給定域名是否屬於某個品牌的能力。大型語言模型（LLMs）憑藉其對品牌域名關係的廣泛知識，為這個問題提供了一種有前景的零配置方法，但它們在品牌情報任務中的可靠性仍然未知。我們對LLM品牌情報在三個任務上的首次系統實證評估進行了展示：域名枚舉（Q1）、開放式品牌歸屬（Q2）和二元所有權分類（Q3）。我們在36個最常被釣魚的品牌上，評估了四個模型，分別是Gemini 2.5 Flash、Gemini 3.5 Flash、Claude Sonnet 4.5和Claude Sonnet 4.6，在四種檢索設定（上下文、網絡搜索、WHOIS查詢和綜合）下進行評估。我們的結果揭示了一個明顯的二分法：模型在僅憑記憶枚舉品牌域名時達到最高82%的精確度，但在沒有外部工具的情況下無法進行所有權驗證，ICL模式下的宏觀F1最高為0.37。WHOIS增強將Q3的宏觀F1提升了最多0.65個點，實現了近乎完美的精確度（<= 0.99），顯著降低了防禦者的虛假正面風險。我們提供了具體的建議，用於在品牌保護管道中部署LLMs。
2606.20868.author: Fathima Mashood et.al.
